name: Brainrot Clicker
description: Play the best brainrot clicker! Your favorite characters and a variety of cool worlds await you. Level up your clicks, respawn, and listen to your favorite brainrot music!
instructions: 1 Tap the screen to collect coins The faster you click the more coins you get 2 Reborn ndash discover new worlds Accumulate enough coins to be reborn and unlock unique locations with cool bloggers 3 Purchase upgrades Each upgrade will give you
